title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.469 - Tax exempt or nonprofit status granted by state not to be affected
text:
208.469.  Tax exempt or nonprofit status granted by state not to be affected. — Nothing in sections 208.450* to 208.480 shall be deemed to affect or in any way limit the tax exempt or nonprofit status of any hospital granted by state law.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1744 § 208.445) 
Expires 9-30-29; see § 208.480
*Section 208.450 was repealed by L. 1994 H.B. 1362.
